steps.name: gcr.io/cloud-builders/docker@sha256:efdbd755476e7e5eb1077ed6e4bf691f87b38fbded575e9b825f9480374f8f4b
args:
IMAGE=us-central1-docker.pkg.dev/rbwg-d-demo1025-260304183118/rbw-demo1025-repository/rbev-busybox
echo '=== Creating multi-platform manifest from per-platform images ==='
docker buildx imagetools create \
  -t $${IMAGE}:varB-combined \
  $${IMAGE}:varB-amd64 \
  $${IMAGE}:varB-arm64 \
  $${IMAGE}:varB-armv7
echo '=== Inspecting combined manifest ==='
docker buildx imagetools inspect $${IMAGE}:varB-combined
